title: acer campestre subvar. molle
intro: Acer campestre subvar. molle, also known as the smooth-leaved field maple, is a subspecies of the field maple tree (Acer campestre) native to Europe. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Acer campestre subvar. molle include relief from digestive issues, reduction of fever, and improvement of respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
